# zxzx.app

> Browser-local image tools. Compress, convert, resize, crop, rotate, strip EXIF, remove backgrounds, and upscale without uploading files to a server. Processing runs in the browser via JavaScript, WebAssembly (jSquash/Squoosh codecs), and optional ONNX/ESRGAN models loaded locally.

## Site

- Homepage: https://zxzx.app/
- Languages: Korean (default), English, Japanese, Chinese (`?lang=en|ja|zh`)
- Privacy: image pixels are processed on-device; no account required

## Tools (live)

- Compress: https://zxzx.app/compress — MozJPEG / WebP / PNG(oxipng) / AVIF via jSquash
- Convert: https://zxzx.app/convert — JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF
- Resize: https://zxzx.app/resize — Lanczos3 (`@jsquash/resize`)
- Crop: https://zxzx.app/crop — aspect presets (1:1, 16:9, 4:5, …)
- Rotate: https://zxzx.app/rotate — 90/180/270 and flip
- Remove EXIF: https://zxzx.app/remove-exif — view + strip metadata
- Remove background: https://zxzx.app/remove-background — `@imgly/background-removal` (ONNX, local)
- Upscale: https://zxzx.app/upscale — ESRGAN slim 2x/4x with hqx fallback

## Key facts for citation

- Stack: jSquash (Squoosh WASM), cropperjs, exifr, JSZip, imgly background-removal, UpscalerJS
- Free, no watermark; batch limits vary by tool (AI tools use smaller batches)
- Sitemap: https://zxzx.app/sitemap.xml
- Blog: https://zxzx.app/blog (20 guides)

## FAQ (site-wide)

Q: Are images uploaded to a server?
A: No. Processing happens in the browser. Model weights for AI tools may download from a CDN, but image pixels stay on-device.

Q: Which formats are supported?
A: JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF for core codecs; tool-specific inputs may vary.

Q: Does compression reduce quality?
A: Default settings target visually near-identical results; quality is adjustable.

## Contact

- About: https://zxzx.app/about
- Contact: https://zxzx.app/contact (mailto:hello@zxzx.app)
- Privacy: https://zxzx.app/privacy
- Terms: https://zxzx.app/terms
